nasb.text: You shall march around the city, all the men of war circling the city once. You shall do so for six days.

esv.text: You shall march around the city, all the men of war going around the city once. Thus shall you do for six days.

cnv.text: 你們所有能作戰的男丁要圍繞這城，一天圍繞一次，六天都要這樣行；

ccb.text: 你所有的军队要每天绕城一圈，连续六天，
